articles.author: Brennan Leach, Kyle Stewart, Melanie Zanona, Frank Thorp V
articles.title: Trump cancels plan to sign major housing bill as he fights with Congress over the SAVE Act - NBC News
articles.description: President Donald Trump abruptly canceled his plans to sign a major, bipartisan housing bill on Wednesday, saying he will not do so until Congress passes the SAVE America Act, a sweeping elections bill that has become a focal point of his second term.
articles.content: WASHINGTON President Donald Trump abruptly canceled his plans to sign a major, bipartisan housing bill Wednesday, saying he will not do so until Congress passes the SAVE America Act, a sweeping elect… [+6548 chars]

articles.title: Life, Larry, and the Pursuit of Unhappiness review: Larry David's pretty, pretty good skewering of America - Roger Ebert
articles.description: A clever, insightful, and politically savvy series.
articles.content:
Theyre calling Larry Davids new HBO original limited sketch comedy series Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness, which seems like a missed opportunity.
I mean, Curb Your History was right there… [+4645 chars]
